name: The Willows Golf Lounge
about: The Willows Golf Lounge is an indoor golf facility in Malvern, PA, utilizing Foresight Falcon simulator technology. The venue offers a premium indoor golf experience with a welcoming lounge atmosphere, suitable for all skill levels. Pricing includes hourly rates for the public and a tiered membership system, providing options from casual play to unlimited access with exclusive benefits.
why_golfers_like_it: Foresight Falcon technology provides tour-level precision and realism
VIP Bay offers a private, luxurious simulator suite for special occasions
Welcoming atmosphere with a comfortable lounge setting for relaxation
Variety of membership tiers to fit different levels of play and budget
Year-round indoor play regardless of weather conditions

food_and_drink.notes: Food delivered to your bay from partnered local favorites
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB is not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium overhead simulator technology with quadrascopic camera system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if they provide rental clubs, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is delivered to your bay from partnered local favorites, but there is no mention of a BYOB policy for alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes, as it depends on the simulator software and player speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Willows Golf Lounge offers a junior membership program for ages 8-17 and is described as an awesome spot for the entire family.
